Flow.description: Data table that shows GR's their previously submitted Phase Requests in the portal, once a row is selected from the data table, a screen flow shows the details of the phase request in read only format.
Flow.label: GMS - View Phase Requests

recordLookups.description: Get's all Phase Requests where Status is not equal to "Awaiting Changes (GR)"
recordLookups.name: Get_Phase_Requests
recordLookups.label: Get Phase Requests

fields.name: I_I_confirm_that_all_homes_for_all_consortium_members_in_this_phase_are_suitable
fields.fieldText: I. I confirm that all homes (for all consortium members) in this phase are suitable for retrofit (KPI1); i.e. have completed retrofit assessments and a confirmed EPC rating. If you mark 'No' please include a justification of why this is the case as well as the true % of completed retrofit assessments.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why this is the case as well as the true % of completed retrofit assessments.

fields.name: II_I_confirm_that_all_homes_for_all_consortium_members_included_in_this_phase_ar
fields.fieldText: II. I confirm that all homes (for all consortium members) included in this phase are ready for installations to start (KPI2), which includes securing 100% of resident sign-ups. If you mark 'No' please include a justification of why this is the case as well as the true % of resident sign-ups.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why this is the case as well as the true % of resident sign-ups.

fields.name: III_This_phase_request_matches_my_Phase_Request_baseline_previously_submitted_an
fields.fieldText: III. This phase request matches my Phase Request baseline previously submitted and outlined in the GFA.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_this_phase_request_does
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why this phase request does not match your previously submitted baseline.

fields.name: IV_I_am_able_to_carry_over_any_deviation_to_my_Phase_Request_baseline_into_other
fields.fieldText: IV. I am able to carry over any deviation to my Phase Request baseline into other phases, without an impact on overall project baselines or spend incurred forecasts with any financial Year.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_you_cannot_carry_over
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why you cannot carry over any deviation.

fields.name: V_I_acknowledge_that_this_phase_request_will_result_in_a_change_and_I_confirm_th
fields.fieldText: V. I acknowledge that this phase request will result in a change and I confirm that I have attached an accompanying Project Change Request.

fields.name: VI_All_measure_types_included_in_this_phase_outlined_in_Section_3_PR_Stock_Measu
fields.fieldText: VI. All measure types included in this phase, outlined in form Section 6 ‘Measures’, are compliant with Section 2.9 'Eligible Measures' in the Wave 3 Guidance.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_all_measure_types
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why all measure types are not compliant.

fields.name: VII_I_confirm_all_key_project_roles_including_the_Primary_Contractor_conducting
fields.fieldText: VII. I confirm all key project roles, including the Primary Contractor conducting the scope of works for this phase, are in place and ready to start the scope defined in this phase.

fields.name: Please_provide_assurance_of_the_Prime_Contractor_being_signed_up_in_time_for_Pha
fields.fieldText: Please provide assurance of the Primary Contractor being signed-up in time for Phase commencement.

fields.name: VIII_If_the_phase_will_see_greater_than_15_of_grant_funding_and_or_15_total_fund
fields.fieldText: VIII. If the phase will see greater than 15% of grant funding and/or 15% total funding spend on A&A costs, I confirm I will still be able to comply with the scheme's A&A policy for the overall project.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_you_won_t_be_able_to_comply_with_the_schem
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why you won't be able to comply with the scheme's A&A policy.

fields.name: IX_I_have_received_a_DESNZ_signed_copy_of_my_GFA_FRA_and_FMP_and_have_updated_my
fields.fieldText: IX. I have received a DESNZ signed copy of my GFA, FRA and FMP and have updated my FRA/FMP based on this phase request, where necessary.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_you_haven_t_received_your_GFA_or_updated_y
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why you haven't received your GFA or updated your FRA/FMP.

fields.name: XI_I_have_updated_my_project_plan_and_Risk_register_in_accordance_with_this_Phas
fields.fieldText: X. I have updated my project plan and Risk register in accordance with this Phase Request.

fields.name: Please_include_a_justification_of_why_you_haven_t_updated_your_project_plan
fields.fieldText: Please include a justification of why you haven't updated your project plan and risk register.

fields.name: Starting_EPC_Number_of_Homes_at_each_EPC_grade
fields.fieldText: Starting EPC - Number of Homes at each EPC grade

fields.name: Ending_EPC_Number_of_Homes_at_each_EPC_grade
fields.fieldText: Ending EPC - Number of Homes at each EPC grade

fields.name: Number_of_non_social_homes_included_in_this_phase
fields.fieldText: Number of non-social homes included in this phase

fields.name: If_you_have_included_any_homes_that_either_start_at_EPC_C_or_any_ending_below_EP
fields.fieldText: If you have included any homes that either start at EPC C+ or any ending below EPC C, and/or any non-social homes, please provide a justification as to why they are permissible, as per the policies outlined in the Scheme Guidance. If you have included any non-social homes, please also confirm that these do not exceed the maximum limit of 70% of homes within a single block/terrace.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_KPI_update_for_the_project_so_far
fields.fieldText: KPI update for the project so far

fields.name: Total_number_of_homes_with_installations_in_progress_started_but_not_yet_complet
fields.fieldText: Total number of homes with installations in progress (started but not yet completed) (KPI 3)

fields.name: No_of_homes_with_installations_completed_KPI_4
fields.fieldText: No. of homes with installations completed (KPI 4)

fields.name: No_of_homes_completed_all_measures_lodged_with_Trustmark_KPI_5
fields.fieldText: No. of homes completed (all measures lodged with Trustmark) (KPI 5)

fields.name: Total_number_of_homes_to_be_upgraded_in_phase
fields.fieldText: Total number of homes to be upgraded in phase

fields.name: No_of_homes_accessing_the_off_gas_grid_LCH_cost_cap_uplift_in_phase
fields.fieldText: No. of homes accessing the off gas grid LCH cost cap uplift in phase

fields.name: No_of_homes_accessing_the_on_gas_grid_LCH_incentive_offer_in_phase
fields.fieldText: No. of homes accessing the on gas grid LCH incentive offer in phase

fields.name: Maximum_total_phase_costs64
fields.fieldText: Maximum total phase costs for this FY

fields.name: Maximum_grant_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes
fields.fieldText: Maximum grant funded costs on LCH homes

fields.name: Maximum_co_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes
fields.fieldText: Maximum co-funded costs on LCH homes

fields.name: Maximum_total_phase_costs4
fields.fieldText: Maximum total phase costs for this FY

fields.name: Maximum_grant_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes266
fields.fieldText: Maximum grant funded costs on LCH homes

fields.name: Maximum_co_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes26
fields.fieldText: Maximum co-funded costs on LCH homes

fields.name: Maximum_total_phase_costs
fields.fieldText: Maximum total phase costs for this FY

fields.name: Maximum_grant_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes27
fields.fieldText: Maximum grant funded costs on LCH homes

fields.name: Maximum_co_funded_costs_on_LCH_homes27
fields.fieldText: Maximum co-funded costs on LCH homes

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Description__c","guid":"column-9182","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Custom Measure Name","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Description","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Measure_KPI_Number__c","guid":"column-8f9a","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Number of Installations","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Measure KPI (Number)","type":"number"},{"apiName":"Cost_to_install_measure__c","guid":"column-ff91","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Cost to install measure","type":"currency"}]
